og.title: Anlin Doors | Deluxe Windows
og.description: Designed and built in California, Anlin specializes in energy-efficient replacement doors made for our climate. Their patio doors combine smooth operation, excellent insulation…

faq.question: Why choose Anlin doors?
faq.answer: Anlin doors are engineered in California for energy efficiency and comfort, and they're backed by an excellent lifetime warranty — a great choice for replacement projects in the Bay Area.

faq.question: Are Anlin patio doors energy efficient?
faq.answer: Yes. Anlin uses high-performance glass and tight seals designed for the California climate to help keep your home comfortable and lower energy bills.

faq.question: What warranty do Anlin doors come with?
faq.answer: Anlin is known for a strong lifetime warranty. We'll review the exact coverage for your chosen door during your free consultation.

faq.question: Do you install Anlin doors in the Bay Area?
faq.answer: Yes. Deluxe Windows measures and installs Anlin doors across the Bay Area, finishing every project with a thorough inspection.
